summary: The build failed because a wget download from GitHub returned HTTP 502, causing the build step to exit and buildx bake to fail; there are additional network/fetch cancellations during image layer downloads.
root_cause: A wget invocation to download a nydus release from GitHub returned HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway, causing the step to exit with code 1 and abort the build (buildx bake failed).

evidence.quote: wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: Shows the network request to fetch the required artifact failed with an HTTP 502 from the remote server.

evidence.quote: ERROR: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: Shows the exact failing command and that it exited with a non-zero status, triggering the build failure.

evidence.quote: ##[error]buildx bake failed with: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: Shows buildx bake aborted due to the wget failure.

evidence.quote: time="2026-05-06T19:55:11Z" level=debug msg="fetch failed" digest="sha256:0288b5a0d7e71a2cdbdf114cb9869ce2bc4b05adfd6aa5e3ee9fa4b3847e7b80" error="failed to do request: Get \"https://cdn01.quay.io/...\": context canceled"
evidence.reason: Additional network-layer failures (fetch failed / context canceled) indicate transient network or remote service issues during image layer downloads.

evidence.quote: time="2026-05-06T19:55:11Z" level=error msg="/moby.buildkit.v1.Control/Solve returned error: rpc error: code = Unknown desc = process \"/bin/bash -c wget ...\" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1"
evidence.reason: Confirms the failed wget caused the solver to return an error, propagating to the build control layer.

evidence.quote: Failed to save: Unable to reserve cache with key docker.io--tonistiigi--binfmt-latest-linux-x64, another job may be creating this cache.
evidence.reason: Indicates a concurrent/cache-related issue that can accompany transient infrastructure/network problems.

suggested_fix: Retry the job (transient network/remote error). If failures persist, verify the GitHub release URL is accessible for the given $NYDUS_VERSION and consider mirroring or vendoring the nydus artifact (or pinning a reachable release), and check network/proxy connectivity to quay.io and github.com from the runner.
